name: Champion Homes, Inc.
summary: Champion Homes, Inc. (formerly Skyline Champion Corporation) is a leading North American producer of factory-built housing with approximately $2.5 billion in net sales for fiscal 2025. The company designs and builds manufactured and modular homes, park model RVs, ADUs, and modular buildings. It operates 48 manufacturing facilities across 20 U.S. states and three Canadian provinces, and runs retail sales centers, construction services, transportation, and a financing joint venture.

products.name: Manufactured Homes
products.description: Factory-built homes sold under multiple brand names across the U.S. and Canada.

products.name: Modular Homes
products.description: Modular homes built for single and multi-family markets; company claims number one U.S. modular builder position.

products.name: Park Model RVs
products.description: Park model RVs sold under brands including Athens Park and Shore Park.

products.name: Modular Buildings
products.description: Modular buildings for single and multi-family markets.

products.name: Champion Financing
products.description: Manufactured housing dealer floor plan and consumer retail financing products via joint venture with Triad Financial Services.

products.name: Champion Construction
products.description: Construction services to install and set up factory-built homes.

products.name: Star Fleet Trucking
products.description: Transportation services for the manufactured housing and other industries from multiple U.S. dispatch locations.

products.name: Retail Sales Centers
products.description: 72 active company-owned retail sales centers under Regional Homes, Titan Factory Direct, and Champion Homes Center brands.

partnerships.description: Joint venture called Champion Financing providing manufactured housing dealer floor plan and consumer retail financing products.
Company holds an investment in ECN Capital Corp., referenced as a financial risk item.
